description: AI web production pipeline hooks for pre-flight validation and post-step notifications

hooks.prompt: Before executing this command, check if the conversation includes a project type (webpage/website/webservice), a business goal, and a target audience. If any of these are missing, politely ask the user to provide them before continuing.
After writing docs/figma-spec.md, remind the user to review open design assumptions before passing the spec to Figma MCP. Suggest running /web-build as the next step.
